title: pilosella brachiata subsp. micrantha
intro: Pilosella brachiata subsp. micrantha, also known as Alpine Mouse Ear, is a subspecies of the Pilosella brachiata plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Pilosella brachiata subsp. micrantha has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Pilosella brachiata subsp. micrantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
